game_info.title: Stone Story Legacy
game_info.concept:
In a realm of perpetual darkness, a single stone could change everything.

App Store URL: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/stone-story-rpg/id1076120218

================================================================================
Full Description:
================================================================================

In a realm of perpetual darkness, a single stone could change everything.

--Game Features--

[Conquer a vast world, filled with monsters, mysteries, and treasure!]

> The Dark World holds many secrets, waiting to be discovered! Embark on your heroic journey to unite 9 magic Soul Stones and restore the light. 

[Master deceptively simple combat to overwhelm your enemies]

> Stone Story RPG is a game that’s easy to learn but hard to master. A robust A.I. does all the exploring, combat and looting, leaving you to focus on strategy!

[Endless hours of wonder await you, Stonehead!]

> Your adventure is just beginning! Play through everything Stone Story RPG has to offer: sidequests, minigames, challenge events, and more!

[Create your ASCII armory]
> Discover countless unique weapons through Stone Story RPG’s engaging crafting system. Mix and match weapons to unlock new, even stronger weapons!

[Defeat increasingly difficult enemies as you progress through the game]

> An adventurer is only as good as their tools. Collect a variety of unique weapons and upgrade them to unimaginable heights! The power of the gods is in your hands.

[Get lost in a beautifully crafted ASCII world]

> Every piece of ASCII animation in Stone Story RPG is typed up character by character. Hundreds of frames of animation bring 8 different detailed locations to life.

[Unlock your true potential with Stonescript]

> For the most hardcore adventurers, Stonescript gives you a blank canvas to create your masterpiece. Craft custom cosmetics, make your own minigames, and achieve superhuman heights by fine-tuning the AI!

Terms of service: https://stonestoryrpg.com/tos.html
game_info.description: Welcome to the Realm of Darkness. You are Stonehead, a hero seeking to restore light by collecting the legendary Soul Stones. Navigate through a procedural shadowy world, jump across treacherous platforms, and defeat the shadow monsters guarding the stones. The world is rendered in a unique vector-simulated ASCII style. Collect all Soul Stones to win!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Left: Move Left
Arrow Right: Move Right
Space: Jump
Z: Attack with Sword
Shift: Raise Shield (Block)
Enter: Start Game
Esc: Pause / Resume
R: Restart Game

TEST_1.test_description: Verify player movement and gravity physics.
TEST_1.strategy_description: The test controller will hold the Right Arrow key to move the player and press Space periodically to jump. This checks if position updates correctly and gravity pulls the player down.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player x-coordinate should increase over time. Player y-coordinate should fluctuate (jump) but return to ground level, confirming gravity works.

TEST_2.test_description: Test combat system and enemy interaction.
TEST_2.strategy_description: The player will move towards the nearest enemy and spam the Attack (Z) key when in range. It will also use Shield (Shift) if health is low.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Enemy health should decrease to zero, removing the enemy entity. Player might take some damage but should successfully destroy the target.

TEST_3.test_description: Test collectible logic and win condition.
TEST_3.strategy_description: The bot will pathfind to all Soul Stones in the level, jumping over obstacles. It ignores enemies unless they block the path.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Score should increase by 100 for each stone. When all stones are collected, gamePhase should switch to "GAME_OVER_WIN".
